summary: Build a calendar-based event/attraction listing system backed by a CMS-style content system for haunt-related items (events, scare zones, shows, hayrides/attractions) with descriptions, custom fields per content type, and shared operating dates based on the main haunt schedule.
architectural_notes: Calendar is backed by a CMS/content model rather than static hard-coded entries.
Content types (events, scare zones, shows, hayrides/attractions) require type-specific fields; not all items share the same schema.
Items can inherit/sync operating dates from a single 'main haunt' schedule source of truth.

existing_features.title: Seed the CMS with the following initial items (names exactly as specified) and ensure they are editable from the CMS UI: Events: “Scream break” (April), “Purge” (May), “east coast” (2027), “Transworld” (2027); Attraction/Hayride: “Farwell haunted hayride”; Scare Zone: “Grave Hell”; Show: “Lost spirits” (coming 2027).

Add a frontend admin/editor experience (CMS UI) that allows authenticated users to add, edit, and delete Events, Scare Zones, Shows, and Attractions, including editing descriptions, type-specific custom fields, and the inherit/override schedule setting.

Add a calendar view in the frontend that displays scheduled items with dates. Include Events and also include other item types (Scare Zones, Shows, Attractions) when they have effective dates (inherited or overridden).
Wire the frontend to the backend using React Query via the existing actor hook so that CMS lists, detail views, and calendar data are loaded from the canister (not hard-coded).

new_feature_requests.summary: Calendar feature to display scheduled haunt content (events and other item types with dates)
CMS-style content system to manage events, scare zones, shows, and hayrides/attractions with add/edit capability
Support custom fields per content type (events/zones/shows/hayrides) rather than a single shared schema
Add description field for all content items
Allow all items to share the same operating dates as the main haunt (inherit/sync from haunt schedule)

Create a backend CMS-style content system that supports creating, reading, updating, and deleting (CRUD) four content types: Events, Scare Zones, Shows, and Attractions (for hayrides). Each item must include a name and an English description field.

Support custom fields per content type (do not force one shared schema). Implement distinct, type-specific fields for Events, Scare Zones, Shows, and Attractions, in addition to the shared fields (name, description, dates).

Implement a ‘main haunt operating schedule’ in the backend and allow all content items to inherit/sync their dates from this schedule by default (“same operation as haunt”). Provide a way to override dates per item when needed.

projectName: Add CMS-style content system and calendar for haunt events, zones, shows, and hayrides with shared operating dates
